channel.title: P2p on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in P2p on Arrans github.io

item.title: rustdesk/rustdesk
item.description: An open-source remote desktop application designed for self-hosting, as an alternative to TeamViewer.

item.title: anyproto/anytype-ts
item.description: Official Anytype client for MacOS, Linux, and Windows

item.title: mudler/LocalAI
item.description: 🤖 The free, Open Source alternative to OpenAI, Claude and others. Self-hosted and local-first. Drop-in replacement for OpenAI, running on consumer-grade hardware. No GPU required. Runs gguf, transformers, diffusers and many more models architectures. Features: Generate Text, Audio, Video, Images, Voice Cloning, Distributed inference

item.title: streamich/json-joy
item.description: JSON CRDT, JSON CRDT Patch, JSON Patch+, JSON Predicate, JSON Pointer, JSON Expression, JSON Type

item.title: anyproto/any-sync
item.description: An open-source protocol designed to create high-performance, local-first, peer-to-peer, end-to-end encrypted applications that facilitate seamless collaboration among multiple users and devices

item.title: Peergos/Peergos
item.description: A p2p, secure file storage, social network and application protocol

item.title: Chocobozzz/PeerTube
item.description: ActivityPub-federated video streaming platform using P2P directly in your web browser
